name: integration_14_ph_launches_today__high_quality_b2b_
method: 14 PH launches today - HIGH quality B2B leads. 48h outreach window. Cold email: congrats on launch + offer beta access. File: leads/producthunt_b2b_leads.csv

phases.name: scrape_ph
steps: filter by category: SaaS, B2B, Productivity, Dev Tools, Marketing
extract: name, tagline, maker_email or PH profile, website, vote_count

phases.name: qualify_b2b
steps: score each launch: B2B signal keywords, pricing page detected, target_market=business
enrich with website scrape for founder email if missing
rank by vote_count desc, cap at top 14 per day

phases.name: generate_and_send
steps: generate personalized email per lead using claude -p (congrats + specific product detail + beta offer)
